metadata.description: The name of the Logic App / Playbook resource.
Azure region where the playbook will be deployed.
Full resource ID of the existing Microsoft Sentinel API connection.
Full resource ID of the existing Office 365 API connection.
Full resource ID of the existing Key Vault API connection.
Production destination for creating automated ITSM support tickets.
Main SOC email destination for standard alerts.
Comma-separated recipients notified when a VIP account is targeted.
Shared security-alerts mailbox used for CC and testing notifications.
Test destination used instead of the production ITSM mailbox.
Test destination used instead of the production SOC mailbox.
Base URL for the identity-management API. Do not include a trailing slash.
Key Vault secret name containing the identity API token.
Test account used when DisableInProduction is disabled.
When true, the playbook calls the production disable API path. When false, the playbook uses the configured test username.
When true, sends production notifications. When false, sends testing notifications.
Display/status label included in testing emails.
Windows time-zone ID used for business-hour checks.
Start of business hours in 24-hour local time.
End of business hours in 24-hour local time.

vipDisableAlertKeyword1.defaultValue: This Alert Title should Disable a VIP

metadata.description: Incident or alert title keyword that permits automated VIP disablement.

vipDisableAlertKeyword2.defaultValue: This Alert Title should Disable a VIP

metadata.description: Optional second incident or alert title keyword that permits automated VIP disablement.

body.Subject: Compromised Account – Identity Auto-Containment – Account Disabled
body.Body:
The following user account is at-risk or already compromised, based on an associated High Risk alert.

To protect the account holder and other critical organization resources, the account was disabled and the password was pre-expired. A request has automatically been sent to the IT Service Desk to assist the user with account recovery.

Affected user:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
Email: @{items('For_Each_Account')['Account']}
Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

*This Security Incident was automatically created and closed as part of an Automated Incident Disruption playbook in Sentinel.

body.Subject: VIP Account Has Been Disabled
body.Body:
Security Controls have automatically disabled the following VIP user account, following a High Risk security incident. The account was disabled because it was at High Risk or already compromised. Analysts will review the incident and relay additional information, if warranted.


Executive Recovery team – Please reach out to the user to initiate a prompt account recovery.


User:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
Email: @{items('For_Each_Account')['Account']}
Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

Position Title:
@{coalesce(body('Parse_User')?['jobTitle'], 'No Position Title')}

Reason:
@{outputs('Compose_Incident_URL')}

Actions Taken:
Account Disabled
Password Pre-Expired
Incident Ticket created/closed in ITSM Tool
Account Recovery Tasks sent to Service Desk

SOC Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Update/Close Incident in Defender

body.Body:
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following user account is at-risk or already compromised:

User:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}

Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

Ticket created/closed in ITSM tool

body.Subject: Compromised Account – Automated Playbook Test
body.Body:
The following user account is at-risk or already compromised, based on an associated High Risk alert.

To protect the account holder and other critical information resources, the account was disabled and the password was pre-expired. A request has automatically been sent to the Service Desk to assist the user with account recovery.

Affected user:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
Email: @{items('For_Each_Account')['Account']}
Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

*This Security Incident was automatically created and closed as part of an Auto Containment automation test in Sentinel.

body.Subject: (TEST MODE) Account Disabled by Auto-Containment Playbook
body.Body:
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following user account is at-risk or already compromised:

User:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
Email: @{items('For_Each_Account')['Account']}
Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

Position Title:
@{coalesce(body('Parse_User')?['jobTitle'], 'No Position Title')}

Reason:
@{outputs('Compose_Incident_URL')}

Actions Taken:

Password Pre-Expired
Ticket created/closed in ITSM tool
Account Recovery Tasks sent to Service Desk

Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Update/Close Incident in Defender.


[Disable Status: @{parameters('DISABLE')}]

body.Subject: VIP Account At Risk
body.Body:
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following Executive account is at-risk or already compromised. Automation has not disabled the account, so that Support may provide VIP hands-on assistance. Please let the Tier 3 team know if we need to assist with re-securing the account.

User:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
Email: @{items('For_Each_Account')['Account']}
Username: @{body('Parse_On-Prem')?['onPremisesSamAccountName']}

Position Title:
@{coalesce(body('Parse_User')?['jobTitle'], 'No Position Title')}

Reason:
@{outputs('Compose_Incident_URL')}

body.Body:

User:
Name: @{concat(trim(last(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))), ' ', trim(first(split(outputs('Parse_User')?['body']?['displayName'], ','))))}
